# Public API surface of pkg/compliancekit, regenerated by cmd/genapi.
#
# Adding, renaming, or removing an exported identifier is a SemVer-
# significant change. The CI gate (`go run ./cmd/genapi -check`) fails
# the build when this file drifts from the package source, so a
# contract change cannot land without an explicit, reviewed diff to
# this file.
#
# v1.0 baseline lands incrementally across the phase commits — the
# initial Phase 0 commit ships the gate and an empty contract;
# subsequent phases promote one type family at a time.

const CategoryCompliance = "compliance"
const CategoryThreatModel = "threat_model"
const SearchTypeDoc SearchType
const SearchTypeFinding SearchType
const SearchTypeResource SearchType
const SearchTypeScan SearchType
const SearchTypeSetting SearchType
const SearchTypeUser SearchType
const SearchTypeWaiver SearchType
const SeverityCritical
const SeverityHigh
const SeverityInfo
const SeverityLow
const SeverityMedium
const SeverityUnknown Severity
const StatusError Status
const StatusFail Status
const StatusPass Status
const StatusSkip Status
func DefaultRegistry() *Registry
func Lookup(id string) (CheckFunc, bool)
func LookupCheck(id string) (Check, bool)
func NewRegistry() *Registry
func NewResourceGraph() *ResourceGraph
func ParseSeverity(s string) (Severity, error)
func ParseStatus(s string) (Status, error)
func Register(check Check, fn CheckFunc)
func RegisteredChecks() []Check
func RegisteredCount() int
func RegisteredIDs() []string
func Unregister(id string) bool
method (*Framework) IsThreatModel() bool
method (*Registry) Check(id string) (Check, bool)
method (*Registry) Checks() []Check
method (*Registry) Count() int
method (*Registry) Get(id string) (CheckFunc, bool)
method (*Registry) IDs() []string
method (*Registry) Register(check Check, fn CheckFunc)
method (*Registry) Unregister(id string) bool
method (*ResourceGraph) Add(r Resource)
method (*ResourceGraph) All() []Resource
method (*ResourceGraph) ByID(id string) (Resource, bool)
method (*ResourceGraph) ByType(t string) []Resource
method (*ResourceGraph) Count() int
method (*ResourceGraph) Query(expr string) ([]Resource, error)
method (*ResourceGraph) Related(r Resource, edge string) []Resource
method (*Severity) UnmarshalJSON(b []byte) error
method (*WaiverRef) DaysUntilExpiry(t time.Time) int
method (*WaiverRef) IsActive(t time.Time) bool
method (Comment) IsEdited() bool
method (Control) HasTag(tag string) bool
method (Finding) Fingerprint() string
method (Finding) IsNative() bool
method (Resource) Attr(key string) string
method (Resource) AttrBool(key string) bool
method (Resource) AttrInt(key string) int
method (Resource) HasTag(tag string) bool
method (Resource) Ref() ResourceRef
method (Severity) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
method (Severity) String() string
method (Status) IsActionable() bool
method (User) Label() string
type Check struct
type CheckFunc func(ctx context.Context, graph *ResourceGraph) ([]Finding, error)
type Collector interface
type Comment struct
type Control struct
type Evaluator interface
type EvidencePtr struct
type Finding struct
type Framework struct
type Package struct
type Registry struct
type Reporter interface
type ResolvedControl struct
type Resource struct
type ResourceGraph struct
type ResourceRef struct
type SearchResponse struct
type SearchResult struct
type SearchType string
type Secret struct
type Severity int
type Source struct
type Status string
type Tactic struct
type User struct
type Vulnerability struct
type WaiverRef struct

# subpackage: pkg/compliancekit/plugin
const APIVersion = "compliancekit.io/v1"
const KindCheck Kind
const KindNotifier Kind
const KindProvider Kind
const KindReporter Kind
method (*ErrUnknownKind) Error() string
method (*ErrUnsupportedAPIVersion) Error() string
method (*Manifest) Validate() error
type Catalog interface
type ErrUnknownKind struct
type ErrUnsupportedAPIVersion struct
type Kind string
type Manifest struct
type Plugin struct
var AllKinds = []Kind{
	KindCheck,
	KindProvider,
	KindNotifier,
	KindReporter,
}
var ErrManifestEmpty = errors.New("plugin: manifest must declare entrypoint or rego_packs")
var ErrManifestMissingKinds = errors.New("plugin: manifest.kinds must list at least one kind")
var ErrManifestMissingName = errors.New("plugin: manifest.name is required")
var ErrManifestMissingVersion = errors.New("plugin: manifest.version is required")
var ErrManifestNil = errors.New("plugin: manifest is nil")

# subpackage: pkg/compliancekit/rbac
const ActionAdmin Action
const ActionDelete Action
const ActionRead Action
const ActionWrite Action
const BuiltinAdmin = "admin"
const BuiltinAuditor = "auditor"
const BuiltinEditor = "editor"
const BuiltinViewer = "viewer"
const ResourceAPITokens Resource
const ResourceAuditLog Resource
const ResourceComments Resource
const ResourceFindings Resource
const ResourceFrameworks Resource
const ResourcePlugins Resource
const ResourceRules Resource
const ResourceScans Resource
const ResourceSettings Resource
const ResourceUsers Resource
const ResourceWaivers Resource
func NewSet(userID string) *Set
method (*Role) Has(res Resource, act Action) bool
method (*Set) Add(res Resource, act Action)
method (*Set) Has(res Resource, act Action) bool
method (*Set) HasAny(res Resource) bool
type Action string
type Assignment struct
type Permission struct
type Resource string
type Role struct
type Set struct
var AllActions = []Action{
	ActionRead,
	ActionWrite,
	ActionDelete,
	ActionAdmin,
}
var AllResources = []Resource{
	ResourceScans,
	ResourceFindings,
	ResourceSettings,
	ResourceUsers,
	ResourceAPITokens,
	ResourcePlugins,
	ResourceAuditLog,
	ResourceRules,
	ResourceWaivers,
	ResourceFrameworks,
	ResourceComments,
}

# subpackage: pkg/compliancekit/rules
const OpAnd Op
const OpNone Op
const OpOr Op
const TriggerCron Trigger
const TriggerFindingCreated Trigger
const TriggerFindingResolved Trigger
const TriggerScanCompleted Trigger
const TriggerWaiverExpired Trigger
func MarshalActions(a []Action) ([]byte, error)
func MarshalCondition(c Condition) ([]byte, error)
func UnmarshalActions(data []byte) ([]Action, error)
func UnmarshalCondition(data []byte) (Condition, error)
method (Condition) IsAlwaysMatch() bool
type Action struct
type Condition struct
type Op string
type Rule struct
type Term struct
type Trigger string
